home.seoBlockTitle: Scooter, motorbike and accommodation rental in Nosy Be
home.seoBlock: Rentanoo helps you book your stay in Nosy Be in just a few clicks: scooter or motorbike rental with delivery to Fascène airport or your hotel, plus selected accommodations (apartments, villas, bungalows) across the island. Compare availability, pick your dates and confirm online. Helmet and insurance included on two-wheeler offers; secure booking for your nights. Whether you stay for a weekend or several weeks, explore beaches, villages and must-see spots in Madagascar with ease. Book early during high season to secure availability.

sinistreCaution.mailSubject: Quick update following your return inspection
sinistreCaution.illustrationComingSoon: Illustration coming soon (we'll add it later)

hero.subtitle: Damage & deposit
hero.title: Don't panic: we stay calm and take it step by step.
hero.description: A small incident can happen during a rental. Here we explain what happens next simply, to avoid stress and keep things smooth.
hero.bullet2: The deposit is not charged automatically
hero.bullet3: It only serves (if needed) to advance real costs
hero.tip: Tip: keep this link, it's meant to be shared from our emails.

illustration.hero: Header illustration (relaxed couple + scooter, Nosy Be)

process.title: How it works, in concrete terms
process.subtitle: We keep things simple: the owner quotes, Rentanoo verifies, then we inform you before any decision.
process.step1Desc: The owner estimates the repairs needed precisely.
process.step2Desc: We ensure amounts are consistent, justified and documented.
process.step3Desc: Nothing happens "behind your back". We keep you informed before any action.

caution.title: The deposit: what it's really for
caution.subtitle: The deposit isn't there to "punish". It mainly serves to advance real costs if a repair is needed — and only with supporting documents.
caution.bullet2: If withheld: only for justified costs
caution.note: Important: if damages are below the deposit amount, the remainder is not charged.

assurance.title: Card payment: a real advantage
assurance.subtitle: In many cases, you can use your card insurance (or travel/personal insurance).
assurance.card: The deposit can serve to advance costs, then you can request reimbursement through your insurance, depending on your contract.
assurance.note: (We don't replace your insurance: we help you build a clear file.)

documents.title: Documents: we make it easy for you
documents.subtitle: Rentanoo will provide the documents needed for your file (invoice, supporting documents, useful elements).

cta.title: Key points reminder (stay calm)
cta.subtitle: In short: don't panic, we handle this calmly.
cta.bullet1: No immediate charge: nothing is taken "automatically".
cta.bullet2: The deposit only serves as an advance if needed.
cta.bullet3: Never beyond the real and justified repair amount.
cta.bullet4: We'll provide invoice + documents for your insurance (card / travel).
cta.bullet5: The owner has up to 48h to quote, then Rentanoo verifies.

faq.intro: Frequently asked questions — we answer simply.
faq.q1: Will my entire deposit be charged?
faq.a1: No. If there are repairs, only the part corresponding to real and justified costs can be withheld. Nothing is done without verification.
faq.q2: When can an amount be withheld?
faq.a2: Only if damage is confirmed and quoted (estimate/invoice), then validated after Rentanoo verification.
faq.q3: Why not go directly through the vehicle insurance?
faq.a3: Depending on the case, vehicle insurance may involve specific procedures and delays. The "deposit + documents" route is often faster to restore the vehicle, while allowing you to get reimbursed via your insurance (card / travel).
faq.q4: Can I use my card insurance?
faq.a4: Often yes. Many cards include coverage (conditions vary). Card payment is a real plus: we provide the documents you need for your file.
faq.a5: Depending on the case: invoice, supporting documents, file elements and useful references. Everything needed to submit a reimbursement request calmly.
faq.q6: What if I disagree with the amount?
faq.a6: You can reply and discuss with the team. The goal: a fair, documented solution without tension.
faq.a7: The owner has up to 48h to quote. Then Rentanoo verifies the documents. You're informed at each important step.

contact.title: A question? We're here.
contact.description: If something isn't clear, contact us: we reply quickly, and always calmly.
contact.tip: Tip: in your message, include your booking reference if you have it.

meteoNosyBePage.title: Nosy Be weather today
meteoNosyBePage.intro: Check live weather in Nosy Be and the 7-day forecast to plan your trip: beaches, scooter rides and water activities.
meteoNosyBePage.sourceNote: Source: Open-Meteo numerical models. May differ from Météo Madagascar or La Chaîne Météo bulletins, which sometimes include local analysis.
meteoNosyBePage.seoBlockTitle: Climate and seasons in Nosy Be
meteoNosyBePage.seoBlock: Nosy Be has a tropical climate with a dry season from May to November and a rainy season from December to April. Temperatures stay mild year-round (25–32 °C). Before booking your scooter rental, check today's weather to plan beach trips, Hell-Ville market or coastal rides. Rentanoo delivers to Fascène airport or directly to your hotel.

items.q: What is the best time to visit Nosy Be?
items.a: High season is the dry season (May–November): clearer skies, calm sea and ideal conditions to explore the island by scooter.

items.q: Is it always hot in Nosy Be?
items.a: Temperatures are around 25–30 °C. Humidity can be higher in the rainy season; pack light rain protection.

items.q: Is the forecast reliable for scooter rental planning?
items.a: 24–48 h forecasts are reliable. For a week, use them as a trend and keep some flexibility in your plans.

meteoNosyBePage.ctaText: Rent a scooter online with Rentanoo: fast booking, airport or hotel delivery, helmet included.

tauxChangePage.title: Euro to Ariary exchange rate Madagascar
tauxChangePage.intro: Track the EUR/MGA rate for your spending in Madagascar: today's rate, recent trend and ariary equivalent to budget your stay in Nosy Be.
tauxChangePage.manualSource: Indicative rate set by Rentanoo for price display.
tauxChangePage.historyHint: Frankfurter data — actual exchange office or bank rates may vary slightly.
tauxChangePage.seoBlockTitle: Understanding Euro Ariary exchange in Madagascar
tauxChangePage.seoBlock: The ariary (MGA) is Madagascar's official currency. The Euro/Ariary rate fluctuates on international markets; in Nosy Be, tourist businesses often accept euros but give change in ariary. Rentanoo displays scooter rental prices in euros with the ariary equivalent to help you compare. For local expenses (restaurants, tours, fuel), keep some cash in ariary and check the rate before exchanging large amounts.

items.q: What is today's Euro Ariary rate in Madagascar?
items.a: The rate at the top of this page is updated daily via a reference source (Frankfurter). Local exchange offices may differ by a few ariary.

items.q: Can you pay in euros in Nosy Be?
items.a: Euros are sometimes accepted in tourism, but ariary remains the everyday currency. It's best to exchange part of your budget to MGA.

items.q: How does Rentanoo use this rate?
items.a: Our rental prices are shown in euros with an ariary equivalent calculated at the day's rate for transparent booking.

tauxChangePage.ctaTitle: Book your scooter with € and Ar prices
tauxChangePage.ctaText: Compare available models and confirm online — delivery to Fascène airport or your hotel in Nosy Be.

volsNosyBePage.title: Nosy Be flights — arrivals & departures
volsNosyBePage.intro: Check flight schedules at Nosy Be Fascène airport: upcoming arrivals and departures, 7-day programme, airlines and status. Perfect to sync your scooter rental with your flight.
volsNosyBePage.officialDisclaimerTitle: Indicative times — check the official airport site
volsNosyBePage.officialDisclaimerText: Schedules shown here come from a third-party source (AeroDataBox) and may be incomplete or differ from Fascène airport's live programme. If in doubt or before you travel, confirm on the official airport website.
volsNosyBePage.forecastHint: 7-day schedule from today (Nosy Be time). Data refreshed twice daily.
volsNosyBePage.noFlights: No flights in the displayed window
volsNosyBePage.notConfigured: Flight schedules will appear once the data source (AeroDataBox) is activated.
volsNosyBePage.sourceNote: Source: AeroDataBox. Indicative times refreshed twice daily — confirm with your airline before travel.
volsNosyBePage.seoBlock: Fascène airport serves Nosy Be with connections mainly from Antananarivo (TNR) and seasonal international flights. Rentanoo delivers your scooter directly at the airport on landing — book online and save time on arrival.

items.q: What is Nosy Be airport IATA code?
items.a: NOS (Fascène). Main airport on Nosy Be island, about 20 minutes from Hell-Ville.

items.q: Can I pick up my scooter at the airport?
items.a: Yes. Rentanoo offers airport pickup at Fascène when booking online.
No. These are indicative schedules from a third-party source. For the official programme and live status, see nosybe-airport.aero/vols/ or contact your airline.

volsNosyBePage.ctaTitle: Land in Nosy Be with peace of mind
volsNosyBePage.ctaText: Book your scooter with airport delivery — helmet included, 100% online booking.
